# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
    apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
    name: [vNetName]/[subnetName]
    properties:
      addressPrefix: [addressPrefix]
      serviceEndpoints:
        - service: Microsoft.Storage
          locations:
            - [location]
        - service: Microsoft.Sql
          locations:
            - [location]

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: '2021-04-01'
    name: [storageAccountName]
    location: [location]
    properties:
      allowBlobPublicAccess: true
      networkAcls:
        bypass: AzureServices
        virtualNetworkRules:
          - id: /subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/resourceGroups/[resourceGroupName]/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/[vNetName]/subnets/[subnetName]
            action: Allow

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: '2021-02-01-preview'
    name: [sqlServerName]
    location: [location]
    properties:
      administratorLogin: [administratorLogin]
      administratorLoginPassword: [administratorLoginPassword]
      version: '12.0'

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: '2021-02-01-preview'
    name: [sqlServerName]/[firewallRuleName]
    properties:
      startIpAddress: '0.0.0.0'
      endIpAddress: '0.0.0.0'
